title: Row is not fetched in SELECT from VIEW
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT, c1 FLOAT, c2 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 2.5, 'test');
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT t1.c0, AVG(t1.c1) AS avg_c1 FROM t1 GROUP BY t1.c0;
SELECT * FROM v1 WHERE v1.avg_c1 < CAST(v1.c0 AS FLOAT);
SELECT * FROM v1 WHERE NOT(v1.avg_c1 < v1.c0);
key_bug_features: SELECT from VIEW with incorrect WHERE condition
